title: bromus erectus var. laxus
intro: Bromus erectus var. laxus, also known as lax californian brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the Poaceae family and is native to California in the United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, skin irritations, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Bromus erectus var. laxus include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and soothing digestive problems, making it a valuable herb for maintaining overall health and well-being. Herbal preparations of Bromus erectus var. laxus can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures for easy consumption and application, and it can also be used topically in the form of salves and creams.
